sources.title: HEC Curriculum of Nursing Education - BSN and MSN 2024
sources.scope: Official Generic BSN Semester IV structure, credits and course titles. Course content must remain aligned with the official curriculum.

sources.title: Health Alterations
sources.license: Open RN OER; verify item-level notices
sources.scope: Adult health alterations, clinical judgment and person-centred nursing care. Local protocols require institutional review.

sources.title: Nursing Skills, 2nd edition
sources.scope: Physical assessment, documentation, nursing skills and safety. Local procedures require institutional review.

sources.title: Nursing Pharmacology, 2nd edition
sources.scope: Drug classes, pharmacology, medication safety and nursing considerations. Unsupported doses and prescribing instructions are prohibited.

sources.title: Anatomy and Physiology 2e
sources.scope: Normal structure, physiology and homeostatic mechanisms used as the foundation for pathophysiology.

sources.title: Psychology 2e
sources.scope: Psychological science, development, cognition, emotion, stress, coping and behaviour relevant to health contexts.

sources.title: The ICN Code of Ethics for Nurses
sources.scope: Professional nursing values, ethical duties, accountability, dignity, confidentiality and global ethical guidance. Pakistani regulation requires local review.
